items.title_en: 'Magnificent Seven' stocks are the cheapest in a decade, by one measure
items.title_zh: 从一项衡量标准来看，“七巨头”股票是十年来最便宜的
items.desc_en: The megacaps have had a rough year, but they're starting to look like bargains at these levels, one firm said.
items.desc_zh: 一家公司表示，大型股经历了艰难的一年，但在目前的水平上它们开始看起来很便宜。

items.title_en: Delaying Social Security reform raises risks for bond markets and the economy, research finds
items.title_zh: 研究发现，推迟社会保障改革会增加债券市场和经济的风险
items.desc_en: Social Security's trust fund that helps pay retirement benefits is projected to run out in late 2032. New research finds that may pose serious economic risks.
items.desc_zh: 帮助支付退休福利的社会保障信托基金预计将于 2032 年末用完。新研究发现，这可能会带来严重的经济风险。

items.title_en: Rivian tailspin hasn't shaken one trader's resolve
items.title_zh: 里维安的混乱并没有动摇一位交易员的决心

items.desc_zh: 在股价因股票发行而下跌后，Mike Khouw 重新审视了他的 Rivian 交易。

items.title_en: Trump loses latest appeals court bid to restore his name to Kennedy Center
items.title_zh: 特朗普在肯尼迪中心恢复其名字的最新上诉法院失败
items.desc_en: The appeals court said Trump had failed to provide any evidence that the Kennedy Center's fundraising would be harmed if his name is not attached.
items.desc_zh: 上诉法院表示，特朗普未能提供任何证据证明，如果不附上他的名字，肯尼迪中心的筹款活动将会受到损害。

items.title_en: Arizona toddler found alive in hospital morgue after declared dead from drowning
items.title_zh: 亚利桑那州一名幼儿在被宣布溺水身亡后在医院太平间被发现还活着
items.desc_en: After he was discovered to still be alive, the 18-month-old was flown to another hospital and survived.
items.desc_zh: 在被发现仍然活着后，这位 18 个月大的孩子被空运到另一家医院并幸存下来。

items.title_en: Used EVs keep getting more expensive amid Iran war, high gas prices
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争和高油价，二手电动汽车变得越来越贵
items.desc_en: The Manheim Used Vehicle Value Index for EVs — which tracks prices of used vehicles sold at its U.S. wholesale auctions — increased 12% compared to June 2025.
items.desc_zh: 曼海姆电动汽车二手车价值指数（追踪美国批发拍卖会上出售的二手车的价格）与 2025 年 6 月相比增长了 12%。

items.title_en: Khamenei's coffin carried through Shia shrines as ceremonies held in Iraq
items.title_zh: 哈梅内伊的灵柩在伊拉克举行仪式时被抬过什叶派圣地
items.desc_en: The remains of Iran's late supreme leader are transported to Najaf and Karbala, as funeral ceremonies continue for a fifth day.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗已故最高领导人的遗体被运往纳杰夫和卡尔巴拉，葬礼已持续第五天。

items.title_en: Kentucky Gov. Beshear presses McConnell to provide health update as speculation grows
items.title_zh: 随着猜测的增加，肯塔基州州长贝希尔敦促麦康奈尔提供健康最新信息
items.desc_en: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.
items.desc_zh: 长期担任参议院领袖的麦康奈尔在经历一系列健康恐慌后拒绝寻求第八个任期，他于 6 月 14 日入院。

items.title_en: Teenager arrested after two girls, 13, seriously injured in German school attack
items.title_zh: 两名 13 岁女孩在德国学校袭击中受重伤，一名青少年被捕
items.desc_en: Police said a major operation was under way in the area of Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school in Schongau, Bavaria.
items.desc_zh: 警方表示，巴伐利亚雄高韦尔芬中学 (Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school) 地区正在进行大规模行动。

items.title_en: German doctor jailed for murder of 15 patients and suspected of more
items.title_zh: 德国医生因谋杀15名患者被判入狱，并涉嫌谋杀更多患者
items.desc_en: The German palliative care doctor has been sentenced to life imprisonment for killing 15 of his patients.
items.desc_zh: 德国姑息治疗医生因杀害 15 名患者而被判处无期徒刑。

items.title_en: Bezos' Blue Origin valued at $130 billion in first outside fundraising round
items.title_zh: 贝佐斯的蓝色起源首轮外部融资估值达 1300 亿美元
items.desc_en: Bezos' Blue Origin is raising outside capital in a round valuing the rocket company at $130 billion, sources told CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士告诉 CNBC 的安德鲁·罗斯·索金 (Andrew Ross Sorkin)，贝佐斯的蓝色起源公司正在一轮融资中筹集外部资金，这家火箭公司的估值将达到 1300 亿美元。

items.title_en: Eight killed after landslide hits girls' school in Bangladesh
items.title_zh: 孟加拉国女子学校发生山体滑坡，八人死亡
items.desc_en: Rescuers pull bodies from the mud after heavy monsoon rains batter the south-eastern coast.
items.desc_zh: 东南海岸遭遇季风大雨后，救援人员从泥浆中拉出尸体。

items.title_en: Waymo starts driverless rides in four more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
items.title_zh: 随着扩张速度加快，Waymo 在另外四个美国市场推出无人驾驶服务
items.desc_en: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.
items.desc_zh: Waymo 在新兴的美国机器人出租车市场中处于领先地位，并且正在更多城市开展业务。

items.title_en: The American Dream is missing one key ingredient, says Harvard happiness expert: Without it, 'life is pretty grim'
items.title_zh: 哈佛幸福专家表示，美国梦缺少一个关键要素：没有它，“生活将变得相当严峻”
items.desc_en: Only 35% of U.S. adults define the American Dream as being part of a community. But one cannot thrive without the people around them, say experts.
items.desc_zh: 只有 35% 的美国成年人将美国梦定义为成为社区的一部分。但专家表示，如果没有周围的人，一个人就无法成长。

items.title_zh: Meta 允许用户从公开的 Instagram 个人资料照片制作人工智能图像，引起强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，人们可以选择退出，但隐私活动人士称这是“灾难的秘诀”。

items.title_en: Nigeria's president demands to know how fake agency was allegedly set up in his office
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚总统要求了解他的办公室如何设立假机构
items.desc_en: Adeniyi Adeyemi allegedly forged a letter of appointment and secured funding for an agency the presidency knew nothing about.
items.desc_zh: 据称，阿德尼伊·阿德耶米伪造了一份任命书，并为总统一无所知的机构获取了资金。

items.title_en: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.title_zh: 美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间
items.desc_en: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.
items.desc_zh: 在过去 35 年左右的时间里，美联储只进行一次利率调整的情况很少见，无论是上调还是下调。

items.title_en: Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国和伊朗贸易打击后停火已“结束”
items.desc_en: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".
items.desc_zh: 总统在北约峰会前发表讲话称，美国谈判代表“如果愿意”可以继续与伊朗对话。

items.title_en: Cubans protest after third nationwide power cut this year
items.title_zh: 古巴人抗议今年第三次全国停电
items.desc_en: While Cuban officials said that power had been mostly restored, those still left in the dark vented their anger.
items.desc_zh: 尽管古巴官员表示供电已基本恢复，但那些仍蒙在鼓里的人却发泄了愤怒。

items.title_en: Trump opposes Carroll getting $5 million damages verdict, cites last-ditch Supreme Court bid
items.title_zh: 特朗普援引最高法院的最后一搏，反对卡罗尔获得 500 万美元赔偿金的判决
items.desc_en: Trump has been found liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普在两项审判中因诽谤 E·让·卡罗尔而被判负有责任，当时他否认了她在纽约一家百货公司对她进行性虐待的说法。

items.title_en: Trump pours cold water on NATO allies' united front
items.title_zh: 特朗普给北约盟友统一战线泼冷水
items.desc_en: Trump criticized NATO allies over defense spending, attacked Spain and renewed his Greenland push during the alliance’s summit in Turkey.

items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他不想与西班牙有任何关系：“切断所有贸易”
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

items.title_en: How Esports World Cup moved from Saudi Arabia to Paris in 8 weeks
items.title_zh: 电子竞技世界杯如何在 8 周内从沙特阿拉伯移师巴黎

items.title_en: Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚最大电信公司发生重大停电，火车和紧急呼叫受到影响
items.desc_en: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.
items.desc_zh: 悉尼和墨尔本数据中心的服务器是罪魁祸首，但确切原因仍不清楚。

items.title_en: US strikes target Iranian military boats
items.title_zh: 美国空袭伊朗军舰
items.desc_en: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国针对霍尔木兹海峡三艘油轮遇袭事件对伊朗发动打击。

items.title_en: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project
items.title_zh: 北约盟国宣布斥资370亿英镑用于新导弹项目
items.desc_en: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.
items.desc_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默爵士将在安卡拉召集十几位领导人讨论该计划。

items.title_en: Utah boarding school where Paris Hilton alleged abuse as a teen loses its licence
items.title_zh: 帕丽斯·希尔顿 (Paris Hilton) 因虐待犹他州寄宿学校青少年而被吊销执照
items.desc_en: Hilton said the facility "failed the children", as regulators cited neglect and use of unnecessary restraints.
items.desc_zh: 希尔顿表示，该设施“辜负了孩子们的期望”，监管机构称其疏忽和使用了不必要的限制。

items.title_en: Australia dock workers call for 28-hour week in AI talks
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚码头工人在人工智能谈判中呼吁每周工作 28 小时
items.desc_en: A union says workers are "in the crosshairs" of automation as AI is being tested across ports.
items.desc_zh: 一个工会表示，随着人工智能正在跨港口进行测试，工人们正处于自动化的“十字准线”中。

items.title_en: Top Democrats press Maine Senate candidate to drop out of race over sexual assault allegation
items.title_zh: 民主党高层敦促缅因州参议员候选人因性侵犯指控退出竞选
items.desc_en: Graham Platner denied the allegation, calling it "categorically false" but said he was "taking the time to reflect on the best path forward".
items.desc_zh: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳否认了这一指控，称其“绝对错误”，但表示他“正在花时间思考最佳的前进道路”。

items.title_en: Orbit for Mac
items.title_zh: Orbit for Mac
items.desc_en: Every Google account, in a single window
items.desc_zh: 每个 Google 帐户都在一个窗口中

items.title_zh: NanoKVM-Go
items.desc_en: Give your AI agent physical control over any screen
items.desc_zh: 让您的 AI 代理对任何屏幕进行物理控制

items.title_en: New footage shown at Kirk hearing shows man on rooftop near shooting scene
items.title_zh: 柯克听证会显示的新镜头显示，一名男子在枪击现场附近的屋顶上
items.desc_en: The preliminary hearing will determine whether Tyler Robinson, accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk, will stand trial.
items.desc_zh: 初步听证会将确定被指控杀害保守派活动人士查理·柯克的泰勒·罗宾逊是否会接受审判。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The impact screen time is having on younger children.
items.desc_zh: 屏幕时间对年幼的孩子有影响。

items.desc_zh: 即使您处于离线状态，也能安全地进行设备上提取

items.desc_zh: 自我提升的自学知识库

items.desc_zh: 将您的团队、代理和数据保留在一页上

items.desc_en: Open-source API for Y Combinator & a16z company data

items.title_en: Robots available for rent: But what can they do?
items.title_zh: 可供出租的机器人：但它们能做什么？
items.desc_en: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.
items.desc_zh: 机器人技术日新月异，因此对于许多人来说，租用机器人是有意义的。

items.title_en: Link Preview API
items.title_zh: Link Preview API
items.desc_en: Free API to get Open Graph data, title & images for any URL
items.desc_zh: 免费 API 可获取任何 URL 的 Open Graph 数据、标题和图像

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_en: Bono AI
items.title_zh: Bono AI
items.desc_en: Talk Once. Publish Everywhere.
items.desc_zh: 谈一次。到处发布。

items.title_zh: Jamboree
items.desc_en: Multiplayer synthesizer
items.desc_zh: 多人合成器

items.title_en: Parents warned not to publicly share children’s images amid AI abuse risks
items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.title_en: Orus
items.title_zh: Orus
items.desc_en: Claude for investing in perpetuals
items.desc_zh: 克劳德投资永续债券

items.title_en: Eodly
items.title_zh: Eodly
items.desc_en: Know what your team actually shipped today
items.desc_zh: 了解您的团队今天实际发货了什么

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: PopTask for Apple
items.title_zh: PopTask for Apple
items.desc_en: Turn to-dos into scheduled tasks
items.desc_zh: 将待办事项变成计划任务

items.title_en: Wonka Netflix show faces backlash for AI-generated Gene Wilder voice
items.title_zh: Netflix 节目《旺卡》因人工智能生成吉恩·怀尔德声音而遭到强烈反对
items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: Universal-3.5 Pro
items.title_zh: Universal-3.5 Pro
items.desc_en: Native code switching, better diarization, more languages.
items.desc_zh: 本机代码切换、更好的二值化、更多语言。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？
items.desc_en: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.
items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We hear concerns that shadow banning is limiting access to health advice for women.
items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。

items.title_zh: IvyForms
items.desc_en: A WordPress form builder for real workflows
items.desc_zh: 适用于真实工作流程的 WordPress 表单生成器
